ab: itia naak a tata wa tataal lhmupish a huruy zain Rungquan, miaqay min’a’aura kmathu thithu a aniamin.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Rungquan，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Rungquan, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: ya malhupish miaqay thithu mashimul tataal lhmupish a huruy patatash, tatitish numa patashan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: mutal, mupushaz, muturuz, mashtay pashimul thithu aniamin.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: numa maqa maqarman thithu minzawash miaqay mashimul antu pushuqish thithu.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: mingqarayza mashtay antu pashimul thithu aniamin.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: tata wa qali, mashtay iamin musuun mutusi kilhnaqualh.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: makuntusi iamin isa saran, apishtupuan sa Rungquan, numa min’aura thithu kmathu sa qahil.
ch: 路途中，Rungquan想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Rungquan wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: amashimul thithu huruy qahil, zain thithu a huruy mzai, “ani iaku mani kminathu”
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說:「我也沒有帶耶。」
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: numa izai Rungquan minsasalpu numa thmanit. minbuqnur thithu mzai, “minuiza pashtay maniun antu pashimul iakin qahil !”
ch: Rungquan急的哭了出來。他生氣的說:「為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!」
en: Rungquan burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tataal lhmupish a huruy fuilh thithu, maqa miaqay ihu antu min’ananak makathu sa qahil, numa ihu ya shimimul numanuma antu pushuqish!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: simaqiza malhupish iamin, Rungquan mathuaw matinhumhum mutusi lhupilhupishan a taun, thithu shmimul a numanuma pulhthkizin pushuqish lhai sa tataal lhmupish a huruy.
ch: 隔天上學，Rungquan很早就到學校了，Rungquan把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Rungquan arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Rungquan mathuaw amazayza thithu a tataal lhmupish a huruy, numa fuilh thaithuy dai ya kahiza thithu amin’ananak kmathu numanuma aniamin, numa anuniza thaithuy sa tataal lhmupish a huruy pashimul thithu aniamin.
ch: Rungquan向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Rungquan apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
